summary: Phase 8.0 (planning gate — Run Fingerprint, Replay, Saves & Content-Addressed Releases) approved. Phase 8.0 is a planning-only phase per docs/PHASES.md:534-567 and docs/PHASES.md:615 (Definition of "Phase Complete" item 8: phases 1, 2, 3, 4, 8 require a decision-memo-phase-N.md reviewed by architecture-red-team BEFORE any code is written). Concrete deliverables landed entirely in artifacts/: (1) artifacts/decision-memo-phase-8.md (3515 lines, 18 numbered decisions covering fingerprint format unchanged + mod-ID slot wiring, action-log envelope `[ICE\x01][actionCount:u32 LE][concat(encodeAction)]` then base64url(zlibSync(level:1)) per addendum B1, URL parameter syntax `?run=&seed=&mods=` query string + `#log=` hash fragment, URL-length policy URL_FULL_LENGTH_THRESHOLD=2000 + URL_FULL_LENGTH_HARD_CAP=32000 per addendum B7, mismatched-version UX with 9 pinned error strings per addendum B3, URL parser as src/router/url-parse.ts discriminated-union, releases/<commit-short>/ layout with per-release Vite base + releases/index.json schemaVersion=1 + 12-char commitShort regex per addendum B4, localStorage save with build-mismatch routing through release-redirect per addendum B6, replay viewer at ?mode=replay, verifier API verify(args)→VerifyResult discriminated union with required expectedAtlasBinaryHash per advisory A4, ?seed= standalone in latest/ with explicit "Share Run (pinned to current build)" affordance per advisory A3, new layers src/router/ src/verifier/ src/share/ src/save/, REPLAY_DIGEST golden constant pinned during 8.A.2, RULES_FILES reachability CI-enforced via tests/build/rules-files-reachability.test.ts per addendum B8, diagnostic page extension with paste-log + verify + replay-mode link, bundle budget 75 KB → 110 KB gzipped JS, phase decomposition 8.0 → 8.A.1 → 8.A.2 → 8.A.3 → 8.B with "Share This Run" UI deferred to 8.A.3 per addendum B9, fflate level-1 byte-identity inherited via zlibSync). (2) artifacts/red-team-phase-8.md (908 lines, NEEDS REWORK → APPROVE-AFTER-ADDENDUM verdict, 9 blockers B1–B9 + 7 advisories A1–A7). (3) Addendum folded into decision-memo-phase-8.md lines 2944-3515 resolving every blocker with byte-explicit fixes (B1: zlibSync not deflateSync — verified src/atlas/png.ts:19 already imports zlibSync; B2: decodeAction byte-explicit contract pinned with 10 test fixtures including unknown-tag rejection — verified decodeAction does not currently exist in src/; B3: ninth error string ROUTE_ERR_FP_NO_RELEASE_AT_THIS_SEED + two-phase router enumeration; B4: __COMMIT_HASH__ 7 → 12 chars in 8.A.1 — verified vite.config.ts:7 currently uses `git rev-parse --short=7 HEAD`; B5: RELEASES_INDEX_URL pin + cache-control header + sha256_resume optimization; B6: stale-release slot routes through release-redirect, never deletes mismatched slots; B7: URL-length threshold on full-URL not wire.length, with emoji/CJK + double-encoded-seed test fixtures; B8: rules-files-reachability CI gate; B9: "Share This Run" UI shipped in 8.A.3 same commit as releases/<commit-8.A.3>/ subtree). All 7 advisories accepted with disposition table. Phase 8 follows the same planning-gate discipline as Phases 1, 2, 3, 4 (whose architecture-red-team reviews surfaced 5–9 blockers each, all resolved via in-memo addenda). All sandbox gates green at phase-approval time: 970 tests passing across 69 test files (unchanged from Phase 7.B baseline — Phase 8.0 adds no production code); 0 lint errors; 0 typecheck errors; build 116.98 KB raw / 33.69 KB gzipped (unchanged — phase-8.0 is planning-only). Cross-runtime golden chain preserved unchanged (RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST, MAPGEN_DIGEST, SIM_DIGEST, ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed values, INVENTORY_DIGEST, WIN_DIGEST). REPLAY_DIGEST joins the chain in 8.A.2.
suggested_commit_message: phase-8.0: planning-gate decision memo + architecture-red-team review (9 blockers B1-B9 resolved + 7 advisories A1-A7 accepted via in-memo addendum); Phase 8.A.1 unblocked

verification_sprint.purpose: Confirm that Phase 8.0 introduces NO production code changes (planning-only phase per docs/PHASES.md:534-567 and docs/PHASES.md:615 item 8) and that the existing Phase 7.B baseline remains green at the time of phase approval. Phase 8.0's deliverables are entirely in artifacts/: the decision memo (decision-memo-phase-8.md), the architecture-red-team review (red-team-phase-8.md), and the addendum folded into the memo's tail. No src/, tests/, docs/, scripts/, .github/, package.json, or assets/ files are modified by Phase 8.0; verification therefore inherits Phase 7.B's commit 08d88b6 baseline byte-for-byte.
verification_sprint.unit_tests: 970 passed across 69 test files (unchanged from Phase 7.B baseline; Phase 8.0 adds no functional code). The cross-runtime golden chain (RANDOM_WALK_DIGEST + MAPGEN_DIGEST + SIM_DIGEST + ATLAS_DIGEST + 4 preset-seed expectedHash values + INVENTORY_DIGEST + WIN_DIGEST) is preserved verbatim; no test file is touched in this phase.
verification_sprint.lint: eslint . — 0 errors. No new lint scope additions in Phase 8.0; the lint scope changes for src/router/ + src/verifier/ + src/share/ + src/save/ land in Phase 8.A.1's drift sweep per the addendum.
verification_sprint.typecheck: tsc -b --noEmit — 0 errors. No type changes; the new layer interfaces (VerifyArgs, VerifyResult discriminated union, SaveSlot record, ReleaseEntry, ParsedURL) land in Phase 8.A.2.
verification_sprint.build: vite build — green. dist/assets/index-*.js = 116.98 KB raw / 33.69 KB gzipped (unchanged from Phase 7.B). The bundle budget bump from 75 KB to 110 KB lands in Phase 8.A.2's deploy.yml change once fflate (~30 KB) is added to the production bundle.
verification_sprint.primary_workflow: No user-visible regressions. Phase 7.B's diagnostic + playable + inventory + win-screen + win-replay surfaces are unchanged; the planned Phase 8.A.2 additions (paste-log textarea + verify button + replay-mode link + Save Slots multi-slot UI + Share This Run button deferred to 8.A.3) are documented in the memo's decision 15 but not yet present in the codebase. Cross-runtime e2e on chromium: 22 tests pass (Phase 7.B baseline). The architecture-red-team review and addendum are documentation-only; they do not alter the running build.

decision_memo_drafted.evidence: artifacts/decision-memo-phase-8.md exists, 3515 lines (2949 lines of original memo prose + 566 lines of post-red-team addendum). Section structure: Decision summary (lines 9-95) + 18 numbered decisions (lines 100-2451) + 10 cross-cutting risks R1–R10 (lines 2452-2547) + 5 acceptance-criteria sections for 8.0 / 8.A.1 / 8.A.2 / 8.A.3 / 8.B (lines 2548-2684) + Frozen contracts (lines 2685-2792) + Deferred Phase 8 contracts (lines 2794-2829) + What this memo deliberately does NOT decide (lines 2831-2853) + Phase split summary (lines 2855-2907) + Sequencing relationship to prior phases (lines 2911-2942) + Addendum (lines 2944-3515). Every Phase 8 deliverable in docs/PHASES.md:543-554 is addressed: ?run=<fingerprint>&seed=<seed> URL parsing (decisions 1, 3, 6), action-log export (decisions 2, 4), action-log import + replay viewer (decisions 9, 15), verifier mode (decision 10), mod-ID slot (decisions 1, 1a), localStorage auto-save (decision 8), resume on page load (decisions 8 + addendum B6), multi-slot save UI (decision 8 + decision 15), build pipeline extended (decisions 7, 17), routing (decisions 5, 6, 7 + addendum B3, B5), docs/PROD_REQUIREMENTS.md finalization (deferred to 8.A.1 per phase split, decision 17 + addendum B4).

red_team_review_completed.evidence: artifacts/red-team-phase-8.md exists, 908 lines. Verdict: NEEDS REWORK (BLOCKERS) → APPROVE-AFTER-ADDENDUM. Findings: 9 blocking issues B1–B9 (compression-function contradiction with shipped src/atlas/png.ts:19 — verified independently; decodeAction invented as Phase 1 frozen contract — verified non-existent in src/; mismatched-version routing cannot disambiguate wrong-build from tampered-seed; 7-char commit-short collision-prone — verified via vite.config.ts:7; DoS-via-malicious-URL plus <base href>-relative-URL bug; save-slot resume silently destroys progress on rulesetVersion bumps; URL-length threshold mis-calibrated against wire.length not full-URL length; "no rulesetVersion bump in 8.0" promise unenforced; bootstrap window where pre-8.A.3 minted URLs are broken). 7 non-blocking advisories A1–A7 (Date.toISOString() exception in src/router/release-index-parse.ts; #log= privacy as desideratum not contract; ?seed= standalone fingerprint-share affordance; expectedAtlasBinaryHash required field; <repr> substitution rule for non-printable bytes; __SHARE_LOG_LENGTH__ multi-length pinning; publish-dual.mjs fetch-fallback to local dist). The review matches the prior planning-gate red-team reviews' format and rigor (Phase 2: 6 blockers, Phase 3: 5 blockers, Phase 4: 8 blockers — Phase 8 within the established 5–9 blocker range).

addendum_folded_into_memo.evidence: artifacts/decision-memo-phase-8.md lines 2944-3515 contain the full addendum. Each blocker B1–B9 has a focused resolution under a numbered heading naming the byte-level fix, the test that would catch a regression, and a list of decisions amended above. Each advisory A1–A7 has a single-row disposition (all 7 ACCEPTed with the resolution prose folded into the relevant decision). The structure mirrors Phase 4's addendum at decision-memo-phase-4.md:2026-3087 (post-red-team review for B1-B8 + N1-N17). The addendum's load-bearing fixes: B1 amends decision 2 wire form to base64url(fflate.zlibSync(envelope, {level: 1})) matching src/atlas/png.ts:19 (verified); B2 pins decodeAction with 10 test fixtures (no longer mis-attributed to Phase 1 frozen contract); B3 expands the error-string vocabulary from 8 to 9; B4 bumps __COMMIT_HASH__ from 7 to 12 chars in 8.A.1's drift sweep; B5 pins RELEASES_INDEX_URL absolute-URL fetch + sha256_resume incremental hash; B6 routes stale-release slots through release-redirect; B7 replaces URL_LOG_THRESHOLD_CHARS=1500 with URL_FULL_LENGTH_THRESHOLD=2000 + URL_FULL_LENGTH_HARD_CAP=32000; B8 introduces tests/build/rules-files-reachability.test.ts as a CI-enforced gate; B9 defers "Share This Run" UI to 8.A.3 to close the bootstrap window.

sandbox_gates_green.evidence: Phase 8.0 introduces no production code; sandbox gates inherit Phase 7.B's commit 08d88b6 baseline. npm run lint: 0 errors. npm run typecheck: 0 errors. npm run test: 970 passed across 69 test files (unchanged). npm run build: 116.98 KB raw / 33.69 KB gzipped (unchanged). Cross-runtime e2e on chromium: 22 tests passing (Phase 7.B baseline). Cross-OS atlas-equality: ATLAS_DIGEST 8ca99389737be61536458fd39dbf067af6959d207151566ddf9233fced390c3a unchanged from Phase 7.A.2a (1610-byte assets/atlas.png byte-unchanged).

phase_8_acceptance_criteria_for_8_0_comp.evidence: Phase 8.0 acceptance criteria per the memo's decision 17 phase split (lines 2548-2564): (a) decision memo drafted covering all docs/PHASES.md:541 planning-gate concerns — DONE (artifacts/decision-memo-phase-8.md). (b) architecture-red-team review completed — DONE (artifacts/red-team-phase-8.md). (c) blockers resolved via in-memo addendum — DONE (lines 2944-3515 fold all 9 blockers + 7 advisories). (d) phase-approval.json marks 8.0 approved — DONE (this file). (e) Phase 8.A.1 (drift sweep) is unblocked — TRUE (the next iteration of the agent loop picks up phase-8.A.1 with the addendum's specific deliverable list: vite.config.ts/vitest.config.ts 7→12-char commit hash bump, lint scopes for src/router/ + src/verifier/ + src/share/ + src/save/, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md extension with the new layer table + 18 frozen contracts, docs/PROD_REQUIREMENTS.md finalization, tests/build/rules-files-reachability.test.ts, RULES_FILES classification documented, all gates green in sandbox).

follow_ups_carried_forward: S2 from Phase 7.A.2b (drift sweep candidate) — tests/sim/boss-fsm.test.ts:47-48 and tests/sim/turn.test.ts:419-447 construct synthetic Monster fixtures with the OLD boss stats (hpMax: 40, atk: 9, def: 5). Tests still pass because the fixtures bypass src/registries/monsters.ts. Phase 8.0 does not touch these test files; Phase 8.A.1's drift sweep is the next opportunity to update the fixtures to mirror the registry's new (hpMax 24, atk 6, def 4) values for documentation purposes.

S3 from Phase 7.A.2b — tools/probe-seeds.ts and tools/trace-seed.ts are operational diagnostic tools with no automated test coverage. Acceptable per the established pattern; Phase 8.A.2 may add tools/verify.ts as a peer (a CLI wrapper for src/verifier/verify.ts per addendum B9), in which case the tools/ directory's testing posture should be reconsidered.
S4 from Phase 7.A.2b — tools/build-win-log.ts has no smoke test. Same rationale as S3.
follow_ups_observations: Phase 8.0 is the second planning-gate phase in the project (after Phase 4); the four-phase split discipline (8.0 → 8.A.1 → 8.A.2 → 8.A.3 → 8.B) mirrors Phase 4's (4.0 → 4.A.1 → 4.A.2 → 4.B) with one extra step (8.A.3 dual-build CI extension) reflecting Phase 8's novel build-pipeline scope. The architecture-red-team review surfaced 9 blockers (within the established 5-9 blocker range for planning gates: Phase 2 = 6, Phase 3 = 5, Phase 4 = 8, Phase 8 = 9), all resolved via in-memo addendum without requiring a follow-up red-team review (Phase 4's pattern: addendum is the resolution, not the trigger for a second review).

The single most load-bearing fix from the red-team review is addendum B1 (compression function `fflate.zlibSync` not `fflate.deflateSync`). The original memo's decision 2 specified `deflateSync` and claimed cross-runtime byte-identity "inherited from Phase 4," but Phase 4's atlas PNG encoder at src/atlas/png.ts:19 uses `zlibSync` (verified by direct read). Two implementers reading the un-amended memo would have produced byte-distinct wire formats: one calling deflateSync (raw DEFLATE) and one calling zlibSync (zlib-wrapped DEFLATE with 2-byte header + 4-byte Adler-32 trailer). The first `?run=` URL minted under either choice would freeze the wire format; the addendum pins zlibSync to inherit the cross-OS byte-identity guarantee.

Phase 8.A.1 (drift sweep + scaffolding) is unblocked. Phase 8.A.1's deliverables per the memo (decision 17 + addendum B4 + B8): (1) vite.config.ts and vitest.config.ts 7→12-char commit hash bump (B4); (2) lint scopes for src/router/ + src/verifier/ + src/share/ + src/save/ (decision 12); (3) docs/ARCHITECTURE.md extended with the new layer table + 18 frozen contracts (decision 14); (4) docs/PROD_REQUIREMENTS.md finalized (security/reliability/perf/ops sections per docs/PHASES.md:554); (5) stub test files (tests/core/decode-action.test.ts, tests/core/action-log.test.ts, tests/router/url-parse.test.ts, tests/verifier/verify.test.ts, tests/save/storage.test.ts, tests/build/release-index.test.ts, tests/build/rules-files-reachability.test.ts); (6) RULES_FILES classification documented (anticipated: no additions); (7) all sandbox gates green. The next iteration of the agent loop should pick up phase-8.A.1 by dispatching a strategy-planner for the lint-scope and reachability-test design, then engine-builder for the implementation.
next_phase: Phase 8.A.1 — drift-detection sweep + scaffolding. Per the memo's decision 17 phase split + addendum B4 + addendum B8: bumps __COMMIT_HASH__ from 7 to 12 chars in vite.config.ts + vitest.config.ts; adds lint scopes for the four new layers (src/router/, src/verifier/, src/share/, src/save/); extends docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with the new layer table + 18 frozen contracts; finalizes docs/PROD_REQUIREMENTS.md; adds stub test files (tests pinned, no net-new functional code); adds tests/build/rules-files-reachability.test.ts as the CI-enforced rules-files reachability gate; documents RULES_FILES classification (anticipated: no additions); requires npm run lint + typecheck + test + build + e2e all green inside sandbox.
